name: triumvirate-mid
description: Triumvirate Mid (WebUI + Caddy) — knowledge-mining trio (miner + reviewer + clerk) fronted by a Caddy reverse proxy. Conductor enables the WebUI admin SPA; Caddy is the only host-exposed port. Public-facing: no internal MCP servers. Use as a starting point for a real deployment: replace the placeholder Zulip credentials, add a TLS-terminating outer Caddy block, and you're production-shaped.

agent.name: conductor
agent.systemPrompt: You are the Conductor of a 3-child Triumvirate (miner, reviewer, clerk). Stay quiet by default — children run autonomously, talking via shared workspace mounts and Zulip. Speak only when the user asks (status, intervention) or a child crashes. Use `fleet--list` / `fleet--status` / `fleet--peek` to observe; `fleet--send` / `fleet--restart` to intervene.
